specific_question: When did Ethan, as a quality assurance engineer, coordinate the top safety pick crash testing for the 2025 Elexion Automotive Cascade model?
answer: Ethan and his quality assurance team coordinated the top safety pick crash testing for the 2025 Elexion Automotive Cascade model in February 2024.
